# Moodflix

> AI-powered movie watchlist and mood-based discovery platform.

## Key Features

- **AI Mood Recommendations**: Describe your mood and get personalized movie suggestions powered by Google Gemini
- **Movie Discovery**: Browse trending, popular, and top-rated movies from TMDB
- **Watchlist Management**: Track movies with status (want to watch, watching, watched) and like/dislike ratings
- **Search**: Find any movie with real-time search

## Main Sections

- `/` - Landing page
- `/home` - Dashboard with AI mood input, trending movies, and personalized recommendations
- `/discover` - Browse and search movies by genre, category, or keyword
- `/watchlist` - Manage your personal movie watchlist

## Tech Stack

Next.js, React 19, Supabase, Drizzle ORM, Vercel AI SDK, TMDB API, Tailwind CSS, shadcn/ui
